file:
# DentBook — Claude Code Context
## Project Overview DentBook is a dental appointment booking SaaS for clinics and dental offices.
## Stack | Layer | Technology | |-------|-----------| | Backend | Laravel 12 + PHP 8.3 | | Frontend | React 18 | | Database | PostgreSQL 16 |

# DentBook
## What Is This? DentBook is a platform for managing dental appointments with patient records and SMS reminders.
## Users & Roles | Role | Can Do | |------|--------| | Admin | Manage everything | | Dentist | View schedule, manage patients | | Patient | Book appointments |

# DentBook Development
## Phase 1 — Foundation - [ ] Set up Laravel project - [ ] Create migrations - [ ] Build API endpoints - [ ] Add authentication
## Phase 2 — Features - [ ] Appointment scheduling - [ ] Patient records - [ ] SMS reminders - [ ] Payment integration
## Phase 3 — Launch - [ ] Testing - [ ] Documentation - [ ] Deployment

# DentBook Architecture
## Database Schema
### appointments | Column | Type | Notes | |--------|------|-------| | id | BIGSERIAL PK | | | patient_id | BIGINT FK | → patients.id | | dentist_id | BIGINT FK | → users.id | | starts_at | TIMESTAMP | | | ends_at | TIMESTAMP | | | status | VARCHAR(50) | |
### patients | Column | Type | Notes | |--------|------|-------| | id | BIGSERIAL PK | | | name | VARCHAR(255) | | | email | VARCHAR(255) | | | phone | VARCHAR(50) | |

# DentBook Constants
## Appointment Statuses | Value | Description | |-------|-------------| | scheduled | Appointment is confirmed | | completed | Appointment finished | | cancelled | Appointment cancelled | | no_show | Patient did not arrive |

# DentBook Patterns
## Service Layer All business logic lives in service classes, not controllers.
## Tenant Scoping All queries are scoped to the current tenant via a global scope.

# DentBook Decisions
## Why PostgreSQL? Best support for JSONB columns needed for flexible scheduling data.
## Why Sanctum? Simple token auth, perfect for SPA + mobile API.
